title: Deloitte India is Hiring: Credit Analyst (Lead)

jsonLd.title: Deloitte India is Hiring: Credit Analyst (Lead)
jsonLd.description:
Deloitte India is actively seeking a talented and motivated Credit Analyst to join our dynamic team in Meerut. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Deloitte India:
Deloitte India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes
• Prepare MIS reports for senior management review

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Power BI
• Proficiency in SAP FICO
• Proficiency in Income Tax
• Proficiency in Tally
• Proficiency in Credit Analysis
• Proficiency in Ind AS
• Proficiency in IFRS
• Proficiency in Risk Management

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Company-sponsored certifications
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Meerut, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Deloitte India!
